title: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Brian Yu - Chapter 4 - Sensing (live, unedited)
summary: CS50 Chapter 4 on Sensing is an educational video lecture from Harvard University's introduction to artificial intelligence course taught by Brian Yu. The live, unedited session covers sensing techniques relevant to AI systems.
writeup: This CS50 lecture is Chapter 4 of Harvard's introduction to artificial intelligence, presented live and unedited by Brian Yu and focused on sensing. The session sits within Harvard's broader introduction to computer science and programming, which treats AI among its topics. The course is distributed across edX, Harvard Extension School, and OpenCourseWare.
